title: Acceptance Rate block: remove bordered hide/show item row controls
description:
## Problem
Acceptance Rate report block uses outlined styles for the note and the show/hide item rows button, which violates dashboard visual guidelines.

## Behavior Spec
Feature: Acceptance Rate controls follow standard dashboard visual style
Scenario: Render Acceptance Rate block with large result set
Given item rows are hidden by default
When the block renders
Then the informational note does not have a border/outline container
And the show item rows control does not use outline/ghost border styling
And controls match standard muted text/button styling used by sibling report blocks.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation: locating AcceptanceRate block styles and removing outline/border treatment from the hidden-rows notice and the show/hide item rows control to match dashboard standards.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented UI fix in AcceptanceRate block: removed border/outline container around the hidden-rows note and converted the show rows control to text-link styling. Added Jest regression test at dashboard/components/blocks/__tests__/AcceptanceRate.test.tsx. Test pass: npm test -- --runInBand components/blocks/__tests__/AcceptanceRate.test.tsx. Note: existing lint script/config in this environment errors before file linting (next lint --no-cache unsupported; eslint crashes in ajv/eslintrc).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Code committed and pushed on branch codex/acceptance-rate-remove-outlined-controls (commit 2d40642d7). Waiting for integration decision (PR/merge) to mark this bug closed.
